name: charitable-tax-credit-calculator-canada
description: Canadian charitable donation tax credit calculator
author: Daniela Baron

scripts.test:e2e: npx playwright-bdd && npx playwright test tests/e2e/
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npx playwright-bdd && npx playwright test tests/e2e/ --headed
scripts.test:e2e:chromium: npx playwright-bdd && npx playwright test tests/e2e/ --project=e2e-chromium
scripts.test: npx playwright test tests/unit/ && npx playwright-bdd && npx playwright test tests/e2e/
scripts.test:coverage: npx playwright-bdd --config playwright.coverage.config.js && npx playwright test --config playwright.coverage.config.js
